# Muhammed Maksut Çakmaktaş — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of a computer engineer from Istanbul focused on
> cybersecurity, software development and system automation. Available in
> Turkish (/), English (/en) and German (/de).

## About

- Computer Engineering graduate (Jan 2026), Osmaniye Korkut Ata University
- Hands-on with Kali Linux, Nmap, Metasploit, Wireshark, Python, Next.js,
  Unity/C#, SAP PI/PO
- Internships: penetration testing (security firm), SAP PI/PO integration,
  first-level IT support
- Open to full-time roles and freelance work

## Pages

- [Home (Turkish)](https://maksutcakmaktas.com/): full portfolio — about,
  skills, services, experience, education, projects, anonymized client work
  (NDA), showcase, freelance profiles, goals, contact
- [English](https://maksutcakmaktas.com/en)
- [Deutsch](https://maksutcakmaktas.com/de)

## Contact

- Email: available on the site's contact section
- LinkedIn/GitHub/Instagram: linked from the site footer and contact card

## Notes for agents

- The site is a single page per locale; section anchors: #about #skills
  #services #experience #education #projects #classified #showcase
  #freelance #goals #contact
- Client project names in the "classified" section are intentionally
  redacted (NDA); details are shared only in interviews.
